recommendations.title: The Challenge
recommendations.overview: Estranged twins Lizzie and Shane are chosen for a Survivor-like popular game show with college scholarships as the prize.

recommendations.title: Our Lips Are Sealed
recommendations.overview: Mary-Kate and Ashley star in this Down Under adventure filled with nonstop Aussie intrigue, laughs and romance. After running afoul of a notorious gangster, Mary-Kate and Ashley take refuge in the FBI Witness Protection Program. Unfortunately, the gi

recommendations.title: Dr. Dolittle: Tail to the Chief
recommendations.overview: Maya Dolittle is back in a heartwarming adventure of presidential proportions! Maya's dream of going to vet school is put on hold when she gets a call from the president of the United States. It seems the First Dog is out of control, and the presiden

recommendations.title: A Dog's Purpose
recommendations.overview: A dog goes on quest to discover his purpose in life over the course of several lifetimes with multiple owners.

recommendations.title: Run
recommendations.overview: Chloe, a teenager who is confined to a wheelchair, is homeschooled by her mother, Diane. Chloe soon becomes suspicious of her mother and begins to suspect that she may be harboring a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Paddington
recommendations.overview: A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

recommendations.title: Mia and the White Lion
recommendations.overview: A young girl from London moves to Africa with her parents where she befriends a lion cub.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

recommendations.title: The Big Brawl
recommendations.overview: A young Asian American martial artist is forced to participate in a brutal formal street-fight competition.

recommendations.title: Make Me Believe
recommendations.overview: Two meddling grannies trick their adult grandkids into a meet-cute that reignites a childhood crush and old grudges.
